name: chunknet
description: Chunknet is a wallet-based P2P cloud storage desktop app with encrypted chunks, peer discovery, and manifest sync.
author: Diya Ashour

scripts.dev: node scripts/patch-ui-folder-scope.cjs && node scripts/patch-seed-identity-actions.cjs && node scripts/fix-live-clicks.cjs && node scripts/patch-upgrade-paypal-ui.cjs && vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3000
